destinations.destination_title: New actions for skills and competences for safe use of current and future nuclear technologies

calls.call_title: New actions for skills and competences for safe use of current and future nuclear technologies
calls.type_of_action: EURATOM-CSA EURATOM Coordination and Support Actions
calls.admissibility_conditions:
Described in General Annexes to the Euratom Work Programme 2023-2025, General Conditions, A - Admissibility
Proposal page limits and layout: layout described in Part B of the Application Form. For CSA the limit for a full application is 30 pages. Please strickly abide by this page limit. Extension of proposal template by annexes is only allowed to describe specific issues (Financial support to third parties, Clinical trials and Calls flagged as security sensitive). The proposal is a self-contained document. Experts will be instructed to ignore hyperlinks or other information that is specifically designed to expand the proposal, thus circumventing the page limit.
calls.procedure: Described in General Annexes to the Euratom Work Programme 2023-2025, General Conditions, E — Documents and F — Procedure; and the Online Manual
calls.legal_and_financial_setup: Described in General Annexes to the Euratom Work Programme 2023-2025, General Conditions, C — Financial and operational capacity and exclusion
